title: SecretZa Brand System Redesign — Implementation Plan

designDecision.reasoning: The current shield tapers to a point at the bottom, creating a location-pin silhouette. A circle is the universal modern app icon standard, renders identically at all sizes, and eliminates the 'map pin' association. The gradient circle reads as a confident brand colour blob at 16px — the minimum favicon requirement.
designDecision.sihouetteStrategy: POSITIVE (white solid fill) instead of NEGATIVE (cutout). A white solid profile works on any background because the gradient circle provides the coloured stage. The current cutout approach breaks on light backgrounds (white on white = invisible).
designDecision.typoStrategy: Keep S/Z colour differentiation. Add tracking-wider + font-weight 800 for luxury feel. Keep system-ui/sans-serif for universal rendering without font-embed complexity.

phases.title: Redesign LogoMark.tsx
phases.description: Replace the shield SVG with a circle mark. This is the single source of truth — all React renders and static SVG generation flow from here.
steps: Remove the shield path (M32 6 C32 6 50 10 50 24...)
Remove the SZ stroke paths (keep only in BrandWordmark)
Remove the checkmark circle
Add circle background (cx=32 cy=32 r=30) with gradient fill
Add feminine profile silhouette as a positive white path — elegant side-view (forehead → nose → lip → chin → neck flowing curve)
Add 1px definition ring at rgba(255,255,255,0.2)
Keep idPrefix prop pattern for defs collision prevention
Ensure theme prop still accepted (used by callers) — but circle mark is background-agnostic

phases.title: Refine BrandWordmark.tsx
steps: Add tracking-wider (letter-spacing: 0.05em) to the wordmark span
Increase font-weight from 700 (bold) to 800 (extrabold) — use font-extrabold class
Keep S in text-[#3B82F6], Z in text-[#6366F1]
Ensure compact prop still works at smaller scale
Keep BRAND_NAME import — no hardcoding

phases.title: Regenerate all static SVG assets
phases.description: Run generate-brand-assets.mjs (after updating it to reflect new LogoMark geometry) to output all 10 static SVG files in public/brand/.
steps: Update scripts/generate-brand-assets.mjs to emit circle mark geometry
Generate favicon.svg (64×64 circle, no text)
Generate icon-192.svg (64×64 circle + silhouette)
Generate icon-512.svg (64×64 circle + silhouette)
Generate logo-icon-dark.svg (circle mark, dark text context)
Generate logo-icon-light.svg (SAME circle mark — gradient is bg-agnostic, fixes light-theme defect)
Generate logo-full-dark.svg (300×64, circle + dark wordmark)
Generate logo-full-light.svg (300×64, circle + light wordmark)
Generate logo-mobile-dark.svg (compact horizontal)
Generate og-image.svg (1200×630 OG card)
Update public/logo.svg (alias of logo-icon-dark)

phases.title: Verify all touchpoints
phases.description: All touchpoints use BRAND_ASSETS paths or the <Logo> component — they pick up changes automatically. A verification pass confirms each surface.

touchpoints.change: Auto — new logo-icon-dark.svg at same path

phases.title: Run full build verification
steps: npx tsc --noEmit — confirm 0 TypeScript errors
bun run build — confirm clean production build
Visual spot-check: Header, Footer, Admin, Auth, 404 in browser

colorTokens.note: BRAND_COLORS in brand.ts remains the same — only the mark shape and silhouette strategy change
colorTokens.recommendation: Optionally deepen the gradient start from #3B82F6 to #1D4ED8 for a richer luxury feel without changing brand.ts constants (just update generate-brand-assets.mjs)

riskAssessment.breakingChanges: NONE — all touchpoints use BRAND_ASSETS paths or React components; API shape of Logo, LogoIcon, LogoMark components is unchanged
riskAssessment.emailClients: LOW — email uses static SVG tag; circle mark renders cleanly in all mail clients that support img tags
riskAssessment.faviconCaching: LOW RISK — browsers cache favicons; users may see old pin icon for up to 24h after deployment. Add ?v=2 cache-bust query to favicon URL in layout.tsx if needed.
riskAssessment.lightThemeDefect: FIXED by moving to circle mark — no more white-on-white silhouette

estimatedWork.LogoMark.tsx redesign: 2h — SVG path design for circle + profile
